tracks.rawText: 4:31Fire (Remix)UploadMid-tempo contemporary pop track with a strong R&B influence, characterized by a clean, polished production, The arrangement features a prominent, syncopated electric bassline that provides a groovy foundation, complemented by crisp, layered percussion including a sharp snare and steady hi-hats, Atmospheric synthesizer pads and subtle electric guitar strums create a lush, oceanic soundscape, The lead male vocals are smooth and soulful, utilizing a wide range with frequent transitions into a clear falsetto during the chorus, The song follows a standard verse-chorus structure with a bridge that builds tension through layered vocal harmonies and a more driving rhythmic section, The mix is spacious, with a touch of reverb on the vocals to enhance the watery, immersive theme, The tempo is approximately 95 BPM, set in a minor key that evokes a sense of depth and emotional resonance6PublishRemix
tracks.title: Fire (Remix)

tracks.rawText: 1:55perosUploadA high-energy Arabic pop and dance track characterized by a driving four-on-the-floor kick drum and intricate percussion, The song features a prominent, rhythmic synth bassline and sharp, staccato synth stabs that create a modern electronic feel, Traditional Middle Eastern melodic elements are integrated through the use of a lead synth that mimics the microtonal inflections of a string instrument or woodwind, The male vocals are powerful and rhythmic, utilizing melismatic techniques and repetitive phrasing to build intensity, The production is polished with heavy reverb on the vocals and a wide stereo field for the electronic elements, The tempo is approximately 110 BPM, maintaining a consistent, danceable groove throughout, The structure alternates between vocal-driven verses and high-impact instrumental drops featuring vocal chops and heavy synth modulation9PublishRemix
tracks.title: peros

tracks.rawText: 4:17🌙 “Lunae (Luisa)”v4.5-allPsychedelic textures drive the song with warbling electric guitar, swirling organs, and pulsating bass, Layered percussion and reverb-soaked drums underpin trippy effects, shifting tempos, and phase-heavy synths, Vocal lines weave through spacious, echoing soundscapes, distorded, deep female singer, strong male vocal, bass riff, booming 808srockpscodeliPublishRemix
tracks.title: 🌙 “Lunae (Luisa)”
